definition.title: The True Cost of Truck Terminals (Economic Authority Series)
definition.objective: Math over hype. Data over emotion. Carrier logic over marketing fluff. Reframes terminal ownership as a hidden capital drag. Anchors entire high-level drip campaign. Elevates brand intellectual weight.
definition.target_audience: Carriers (primary — CapEx decision makers), fleet operators, brokers, investors, industry analysts. LinkedIn is primary platform.
definition.cadence: Quarterly recurring authority series. Not daily. Use during carrier acquisition pushes, investor discussions, capital ma

campaign_card.target_audience: Carriers (primary — CapEx decision makers), fleet operators, brokers, investors, industry analysts. LinkedIn is primary platform.
campaign_card.campaign_name: The True Cost of Truck Terminals (Economic Authority Series)
key_messages: Typical 10-acre terminal costs ~$15M development, ~$165K per space
200+ property comps: average 43 years old, $86K/space before renovation
LHS delivers all first-class features one space at a time — fraction of CapEx

initiatives: 10-part static math drip series. Micro video clips. LinkedIn authority threads. Future calculator integration for Run Your Numbers posts.

_legacy_card.description: Heavyweight carrier-facing economic authority piece. Jeff's math-backed breakdown of what it really costs to buy and maintain a truck terminal vs. the $100,000 dedicated space at LineHaul Station.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Math over hype. Data over emotion. Carrier logic over marketing fluff. Reframes terminal ownership as a hidden capital drag. Anchors entire high-level drip campaign. Elevates brand intellectual weight.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: CapEx reframing. Hidden cost education. 200+ property comp study. Public vs private cost comparison. Shared-space economic advantage. Run your numbers engagement hook.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for script mining, quote graphics, and still image repurposing.
_legacy_card.repurposing: 10-part static math drip series. Micro video clips. LinkedIn authority threads. Future calculator integration for Run Your Numbers posts.
_legacy_card.timeline: Quarterly recurring authority series. Not daily. Use during carrier acquisition pushes, investor discussions, capital markets conversations.
